name: aggregator skips _meta/ directory contents
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/aggregator.sh" --root "$PWD/tree" --format json | node -e 'let s="";process.stdin.on("data",d=>s+=d);process.stdin.on("end",()=>{const r=JSON.parse(s);const ids=r.rules.map(x=>x.id);if(ids.length===1&&ids[0]==="g-rule"){process.stderr.write("ok\n")}else{process.stderr.write("FAIL: expected only g-rule, got "+JSON.stringify(ids)+"\n");process.exit(1)}});'
setup:
cat > tree/google/g.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: g
  authoritative_publisher: Google
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/g
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:g
rules:
  - id: g-rule
    name: g
    description: g rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/g.sh
recommended_set: [g-rule]
all_set: [g-rule]
EOF

cat > tree/_meta/should-be-skipped.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: should-skip
  authoritative_publisher: should-skip
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/skip
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:s
rules:
  - id: should-skip-rule
    name: skip
    description: should not appear.
    detector: rubric/detectors/skip.sh
recommended_set: [should-skip-rule]
all_set: [should-skip-rule]
EOF
